name: Megumi Sokabe
description: Megumi was the president of the student council before [Nodoka](https://anilist.co/character/19570/Nodoka-Manabe) succeeds her in her third year, and she is also the president of [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/19566/Mio-Akiyama)'s fan club. She stalks [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/19566/Mio-Akiyama) during her last few days in high school because she wanted to see [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/19566/Mio-Akiyama) one more time. The band offers her a song as a graduation gift.
